authority: V41 is admitted only through the source-bound V40 fixed-point rows, unique maximal components of their linear-chain disagreement graph, complete binary component assignment space, and the already-admitted paired-state descent.

required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: V40, the registered linear chain, binary count, complete paired lattice and V3 target-free order are admitted dependencies.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: Runtime reconstructs all maximal connected disagreement components and every binary assignment across them.
required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: A component cannot be split without ceasing to be a maximal connected component, and omitting either binary assignment makes the cube incomplete.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Linear-chain adjacency uniquely partitions the disagreement set into maximal connected components.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Components are counted from sealed target-free state rows; TM and dRMSD do not enter construction.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Guards halt on parent, count, component, cube, source, fixed-point or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: Required before promotion through a sealed L76 cumulative development benchmark.
